blocks.text: `internal/hostintegration.LocalIPCEndpoint` and `DefaultLocalIPCEndpoint` own the C11 endpoint descriptor. They calculate local-only endpoint shape and path; they do not open sockets, named pipes, or HTTP listeners.

blocks.code:
LocalIPCEndpoint {
    channel      DistributionChannel
    hostOS       "darwin" | "windows"
    endpointKind "unix-socket" | "named-pipe"
    path         string
    owner        "store-app" | "helper"
}

rows: Unix domain socket inside app group/container
App Sandbox container or app group

items: `cmd/riido` default daemon socket is computed through C11 `AppDataRoot` plus `LocalIPCEndpoint`.
Windows named-pipe transport reuses the same request envelope and `riidoapi` handler shape.
C1 through C10 must not import OS-specific listener adapters.
